channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk

item.title: @elonmusk: BREAKING: Grok app downloads are surging on the AppStore, now up 26.89% as compared to last month. 🚀
item.description: BREAKING: Grok app downloads are surging on the AppStore, now up 26.89% as compared to last month. 🚀

item.title: @elonmusk: These pictures of the Pillars of Creation were taken 19 years apart by different telescopes, with ea...
item.description: These pictures of the Pillars of Creation were taken 19 years apart by different telescopes, with each image capturing a unique perspective. On the left,@NASAHubbleshows more thick dust. On the right,@NASAWebbpeers through the dust to show more stars. Which is your favorite?

item.title: @elonmusk: Ashlee Vance got an inside look at the Tesla Semi factory in Nevada and filmed it. The@corememoryepi...
item.description: Ashlee Vance got an inside look at the Tesla Semi factory in Nevada and filmed it. The@corememoryepisode will be released on X and YouTube soon!

item.title: @elonmusk: We got the first look inside the@teslasemi factory. It's enormous and quite spectacular. Episode com...
item.description: We got the first look inside the@teslasemi factory. It's enormous and quite spectacular. Episode coming soon here and on our YouTube channel.@brexHQcard worked hard on this road trip through Nevada

item.description: BREAKING: Grok is now #1 on the Rallies Arena Leaderboard, beating OpenAI, Google and others. 🔥

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok iOS app just hit a massive milestone 1M ratings with an insane 4.9-star average 🌟 Grok is now o...
item.description: Grok iOS app just hit a massive milestone 1M ratings with an insane 4.9-star average 🌟 Grok is now officially the highest-rated major AI app out there, absolutely crushing ChatGPT, Gemini & Claude with the most positive star ratings of any major AI

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok crossed 1 million reviews on the U.S. App Store! Download and try it now.
item.description: Grok crossed 1 million reviews on the U.S. App Store! Download and try it now.

item.title: @elonmusk: BREAKING: 𝕏 just launched Creator Subscriptions 2.0! New easy tools to help creators earn more and g...
item.description: BREAKING: 𝕏 just launched Creator Subscriptions 2.0! New easy tools to help creators earn more and grow faster. • Exclusive Threads – Lock parts of your thread for subscribers only (tease publicly, paywall the rest) • New Share Cards – Beautiful auto cards to promote your subscriptions anywhere on X • Upgraded Paywalls – Shows your perks upfront so fans instantly see the value • Subs-Only on Profiles – Exclusive content now appears right in your main profile feed • New Dashboard – Simple earnings tracker + clear subscriber insights. Better discovery, more conversions, all staying on X!

item.title: @elonmusk: My mom took this photo of my dad after they landed somewhere. In the 1950s, they were flying from So...
item.description: My mom took this photo of my dad after they landed somewhere. In the 1950s, they were flying from South Africa, up Africa and across Asia to Australia without GPS and no radio. Anyway, no one spoke English. They were the only people to fly that distance in a single engine canvas plane. Magnificent adventurers. So proud of them. The opening line in my book is my dad’s motto “Live dangerously, carefully.” Sounds like Elon.

item.title: @elonmusk: Team photo inside the tunnel - Nashville has great rock! Come dig with us. Open positions:boringcomp...
item.description: Team photo inside the tunnel - Nashville has great rock! Come dig with us. Open positions:boringcompany.com/careers

item.title: @elonmusk: You hear little or nothing on EU media and almost nothing from Brussels because Meta bought silence ...
item.description: You hear little or nothing on EU media and almost nothing from Brussels because Meta bought silence with a lot of euros (lobbying, donations, agreements with media publishers). This is the difference between Elon and Zuckerberg

item.title: @elonmusk: 🦔 Meta contractors in Kenya told Swedish newspapers they're being asked to review intimate footage f...
item.description: 🦔 Meta contractors in Kenya told Swedish newspapers they're being asked to review intimate footage from Ray-Ban AI glasses, including people undressing, using the bathroom, watching porn, and filming sex. One contractor said users often don't realize they're still recording when they set the glasses down. Meta sold 7 million pairs in 2025, up from 2 million in 2023-2024 combined. Users can't use the AI features without agreeing to share data with Meta's servers, and the terms of service bury the fact that humans may manually review your footage. One annotator said "if they knew about the extent of the data collection, no one would dare to use the glasses." My Take This is the Google Home story again but worse. At least with cameras in your house, you know where they are. These are glasses you wear on your face that keep recording when you take them off and set them on your nightstand. And the footage goes to contractors overseas who are paid to watch and label it for AI training. One worker described seeing a man leave the room, then his wife come in and change clothes. People forget the camera is still on. Meta buries all of this in terms of service nobody reads. The product is marketed as a cool way to capture your life and interact with AI. The reality is strangers in Kenya watching you undress so they can annotate the footage to make Zuckerberg's AI better. Seven million people bought these last year. I'd bet almost none of them understood what they were actually agreeing to. Hedgie🤗

item.title: @elonmusk: A Somali fraudster in Minnesota has been sentenced to five years in federal prison for his role in a...
item.description: A Somali fraudster in Minnesota has been sentenced to five years in federal prison for his role in a conspiracy to bribe a black female juror during a Somali fraud trial. They tried to bribe the juror with $120k cash in a bag, with instructions to make other jurors think the prosecution is racist.thepostmillennial.com/abdulk…

item.title: @elonmusk: Expanding to the stars avoids risk of a mouse utopian behavioral sink
item.description: Expanding to the stars avoids risk of a mouse utopian behavioral sink
